full_text: Mark Adair to Wade, , fine thinking from Wade. Wanted to lap that as he premeditated, but it's a low full-toss outside off, he then from that lap position, opens the face of the bat and glides it wide of the diving backward point and sweeper cover on the dive can't cut it off

full_text: Joshua Little to Stoinis, Caught by Dockrell!! Superb phase of play for Ireland. On a good length and wide outside off, Stoinis opens the face of the bat and guides it straight to the fielder at backward point. Picks out the safe hands of Dockrell. Stoinis goes after a cameo.

full_text: Mark Adair to Stoinis, 2 runs, Even Wade is applauding that effort. But he seems to have done some damage as he takes a few deep breaths in. This is the slower delivery outside off, Stoinis lofts high and it's going for six, McCarthy leaps after running to his left and goes with two hands initially, as he stretches backwards, he is airborne and catches it in his left hand, but he knows he is going to fall on the cushions - so mid-air throws it back and falls without the ball in hand. Maybe landed awkwardly and that's why he looked out of breath. I0$

full_text: Joshua Little to Finch, , superb shot. Finch stays leg-side of the ball, this is back of a length just outside off, he punches past a diving cover-point and takes four

short_text: Joshua Little to Finch, no run, dug in short, Finch ducks early, it flicks the shoulder and loops to Tucker. Finch goes
full_text: Joshua Little to Finch, no run, dug in short, Finch ducks early, it flicks the shoulder and loops to Tucker. Finch goes after he is hit

short_text: Joshua Little to Mitchell Marsh, 1 run, back of a length outside off, Mitchell Marsh punches to point where Dockrell fum
full_text: Joshua Little to Mitchell Marsh, 1 run, back of a length outside off, Mitchell Marsh punches to point where Dockrell fumbles and gives away the single

short_text: Joshua Little to Mitchell Marsh, no run, back of a length outside off, Mitchell Marsh defends off the back foot to point
full_text: Joshua Little to Mitchell Marsh, no run, back of a length outside off, Mitchell Marsh defends off the back foot to point

full_text: Joshua Little to Finch, 1 run, Finch had given up, mistimed the cut to point and Dockrell moving to his left, has time to aim at one stump from side-on, but misses

short_text: McCarthy to Mitchell Marsh, no run, good length and flying through to Tucker at 133kph, Mitchell Marsh shoulders arms
full_text: McCarthy to Mitchell Marsh, no run, good length and flying through to Tucker at 133kph, Mitchell Marsh shoulders arms

full_text: McCarthy to Finch, 1 run, back of a length outside off, Finch punches a single to sweeper cover

full_text: McCarthy to Finch, no run, back of a length around off, Finch jabs the pull and picks out backward square leg

short_text: McCarthy to Mitchell Marsh, 1 run,  fullish on the pads, flicked to deep square leg
full_text: McCarthy to Mitchell Marsh, 1 run,  fullish on the pads, flicked to deep square leg

short_text: McCarthy to Mitchell Marsh, , brutal pull from Mitchell Marsh to get off the mark. This does not rise high and he has di
full_text: McCarthy to Mitchell Marsh, , brutal pull from Mitchell Marsh to get off the mark. This does not rise high and he has dismissed it behind square on the leg-side for a one bounce over the ropes four

short_text: McCarthy to Warner, Caught by Mark Adair!! Third failure for Warner in a row and he stands there in disbelief. McCarthy
full_text: McCarthy to Warner, Caught by Mark Adair!! Third failure for Warner in a row and he stands there in disbelief. McCarthy strikes first ball. A nothing ball, back of a length and sliding down, Warner pulls straight to the fielder at backward square leg. There was just one fielder to avoid and Warner couldn't do that.

short_text: Mark Adair to Warner, 1 run, low full-toss outside off, Warner thrashes it to the right of cover where Dockrell dives an
full_text: Mark Adair to Warner, 1 run, low full-toss outside off, Warner thrashes it to the right of cover where Dockrell dives and saves three runs. Warner would be disappointed for not putting it away

short_text: Mark Adair to Warner, no run, full and tight on the stumps, Warner gets forward to defend watchfully
full_text: Mark Adair to Warner, no run, full and tight on the stumps, Warner gets forward to defend watchfully

short_text: Mark Adair to Warner, no run, back of a length and angling away from Warner, who lets it go
full_text: Mark Adair to Warner, no run, back of a length and angling away from Warner, who lets it go

short_text: Mark Adair to Finch, 1 run, good length sliding into the pads, turned through mid-wicket for one and a loud call of "NO"
full_text: Mark Adair to Finch, 1 run, good length sliding into the pads, turned through mid-wicket for one and a loud call of "NO" from Finch for the 2nd

short_text: Mark Adair to Finch, no run, Finch has run past one and the late swing away beats the outside-edge, wide of the crease c
full_text: Mark Adair to Finch, no run, Finch has run past one and the late swing away beats the outside-edge, wide of the crease comes Mark Adair and angles it in, then it swings away from a fuller length as Finch runs down to drive

short_text: Mark Adair to Warner, 1 run, back of a length on off, guided through gully for a single
full_text: Mark Adair to Warner, 1 run, back of a length on off, guided through gully for a single

short_text: Joshua Little to Finch, no run, full and just outside off, Finch watchfully lets it go
full_text: Joshua Little to Finch, no run, full and just outside off, Finch watchfully lets it go

short_text: Joshua Little to Finch, 2 runs, back of a length outside off, Finch pulls to the left of deep square leg for an easy two
full_text: Joshua Little to Finch, 2 runs, back of a length outside off, Finch pulls to the left of deep square leg for an easy two

short_text: Joshua Little to Finch, no run, back of a length outside off, Finch punches to cover
full_text: Joshua Little to Finch, no run, back of a length outside off, Finch punches to cover

short_text: Joshua Little to Finch, 2 runs, back of a length just outside off, Finch lifts one leg up and short-arm jabs to deep squ
full_text: Joshua Little to Finch, 2 runs, back of a length just outside off, Finch lifts one leg up and short-arm jabs to deep square leg, Warner hares back for the second. Terrific running

short_text: Joshua Little to Warner, 1 run, Punched to point and Dockrell throws it wide, Finch was ambling and did not expect the t
full_text: Joshua Little to Warner, 1 run, Punched to point and Dockrell throws it wide, Finch was ambling and did not expect the throw to come to his end

short_text: Joshua Little to Warner, no run, short of length and going down leg, Warner lifts one leg up to help it away, but misses
full_text: Joshua Little to Warner, no run, short of length and going down leg, Warner lifts one leg up to help it away, but misses, may well have flicked something on the way as it's not called wide

short_text: Maxwell to Joshua Little, Joshua Little Run Out!! That is inexperience right there. Tucker could have denied the single
full_text: Maxwell to Joshua Little, Joshua Little Run Out!! That is inexperience right there. Tucker could have denied the single off the last ball but he allowed Little to have strike and then tries to steal a single first ball of this over. Little reverse sweeps straight to backward point and Tucker called him through for a single, Marsh throws the ball to Maxwell and he lights up the stumps, Little was just short of the crease.

short_text: Cummins to Joshua Little, 1 run, off-pace short of length delivery and Little drags the pull off the inner half to deep
full_text: Cummins to Joshua Little, 1 run, off-pace short of length delivery and Little drags the pull off the inner half to deep mid-wicket, Tucker takes the single

short_text: Cummins to Joshua Little, no run, bouncer on middle and leg, Little makes room and is beaten for pace. The ball flies th
full_text: Cummins to Joshua Little, no run, bouncer on middle and leg, Little makes room and is beaten for pace. The ball flies through to Wade

short_text: Cummins to Joshua Little, no run, slower ball banged into the surface, Little is early into the pull and misses, the bal
full_text: Cummins to Joshua Little, no run, slower ball banged into the surface, Little is early into the pull and misses, the ball hits the shoulder and rolls to point

short_text: Cummins to Joshua Little, no run, short of length around off, Little arches back and attempts the ramp, beaten
full_text: Cummins to Joshua Little, no run, short of length around off, Little arches back and attempts the ramp, beaten

short_text: Cummins to McCarthy, Caught by (sub)Smith!! The partnership is finally broken. McCarthy nails the pull but picks out dee
full_text: Cummins to McCarthy, Caught by (sub)Smith!! The partnership is finally broken. McCarthy nails the pull but picks out deep mid-wicket. It was the slower short of length delivery and McCarthy had time to set himself up for the pull, he middles it alright but does not place it, Smith barely had to move to take that catch.

short_text: Cummins to McCarthy, no run, short of length outside off, McCarthy makes room and cannot connect with the cut shot
full_text: Cummins to McCarthy, no run, short of length outside off, McCarthy makes room and cannot connect with the cut shot

short_text: Starc to Tucker, 2 runs, massive over, Low full toss on the pads and Tucker flicks it to deep mid-wicket, he's happy to
full_text: Starc to Tucker, 2 runs, massive over, Low full toss on the pads and Tucker flicks it to deep mid-wicket, he's happy to come back for the second and allow McCarthy to have strike

short_text: Starc to Tucker, , aims for the batter's toes but Tucker stays inside the line and misses the flick, wide down leg
full_text: Starc to Tucker, , aims for the batter's toes but Tucker stays inside the line and misses the flick, wide down leg

short_text: Starc to Tucker, , this is turning into a massive over. Third boundary off Starc in this over. Off-pace delivery and Tuc
full_text: Starc to Tucker, , this is turning into a massive over. Third boundary off Starc in this over. Off-pace delivery and Tucker picked it right out of the hand, made room and lofted it over mid-off

short_text: Starc to Tucker, no run, charges down the wicket and allows Starc to spear the yorker outside off, no contact made
full_text: Starc to Tucker, no run, charges down the wicket and allows Starc to spear the yorker outside off, no contact made

short_text: Starc to Tucker, , slower bouncer, Tucker makes room and tries to ramp it over short third, but it is too high and calle
full_text: Starc to Tucker, , slower bouncer, Tucker makes room and tries to ramp it over short third, but it is too high and called wide for height

short_text: Starc to Tucker, 2 runs, back of a length and Tucker tucks it with soft hands in front of square on the leg-side, races
full_text: Starc to Tucker, 2 runs, back of a length and Tucker tucks it with soft hands in front of square on the leg-side, races back for the second

short_text: Starc to Tucker, , can he pull this off? The equation is not out of hand but wickets in hand is the problem. Full delive
full_text: Starc to Tucker, , can he pull this off? The equation is not out of hand but wickets in hand is the problem. Full delivery around off, Tucker moves around in his crease before getting in line and lofting handsomely over mid-off, one bounce and over the ropes

short_text: Starc to Tucker, , neatly done! Slower ball on leg-stump, Tucker moves inside the line and laps it straight back over Wa
full_text: Starc to Tucker, , neatly done! Slower ball on leg-stump, Tucker moves inside the line and laps it straight back over Wade. He's frustrating Australia here

short_text: Hazlewood to McCarthy, no run, nails the yorker outside off, McCarthy cannot lay bat on that and it is just inside the w
full_text: Hazlewood to McCarthy, no run, nails the yorker outside off, McCarthy cannot lay bat on that and it is just inside the wide marker

short_text: Hazlewood to Tucker, 1 run, very full and close to yorker length, Tucker jams it onto the pad and the ball rolls into th
full_text: Hazlewood to Tucker, 1 run, very full and close to yorker length, Tucker jams it onto the pad and the ball rolls into the off-side

short_text: Hazlewood to Tucker, , width on offer and Tucker throws his bat on the big drive, the outside edge flies over short thir
full_text: Hazlewood to Tucker, , width on offer and Tucker throws his bat on the big drive, the outside edge flies over short third and races away

short_text: Hazlewood to Tucker, , . He has fought a lone battle and is applauded by the Irish supporters. Full and in the slot, Tuc
full_text: Hazlewood to Tucker, , . He has fought a lone battle and is applauded by the Irish supporters. Full and in the slot, Tucker swings through the line and it is a meaty connection as the ball sails over long-on. He raises his bat and acknowledges the applause

short_text: Hazlewood to Tucker, no run, slower short ball around leg-stump, Tucker moves inside the line and doesn't connect with t
full_text: Hazlewood to Tucker, no run, slower short ball around leg-stump, Tucker moves inside the line and doesn't connect with the pull

short_text: Hazlewood to McCarthy, 1 run, back of a length and McCarthy pulls it on the bounce to mid-on, races to the other end and
full_text: Hazlewood to McCarthy, 1 run, back of a length and McCarthy pulls it on the bounce to mid-on, races to the other end and tumbles over

short_text: Zampa to McCarthy, 1 run, short and bowled into the wicket, McCarthy tucks it to long-on and retains strike
full_text: Zampa to McCarthy, 1 run, short and bowled into the wicket, McCarthy tucks it to long-on and retains strike

short_text: Zampa to Tucker, 1 run, comes down the track and wants to go straight back over, but ends up dragging it to deep mid-wic
full_text: Zampa to Tucker, 1 run, comes down the track and wants to go straight back over, but ends up dragging it to deep mid-wicket

short_text: Zampa to McCarthy, 1 run, quicker and fuller around off, McCarthy eases a drive to long-off
full_text: Zampa to McCarthy, 1 run, quicker and fuller around off, McCarthy eases a drive to long-off

short_text: Zampa to McCarthy, no run, tosses the wrong 'un outside off, McCarthy lunges and pushes it to cover
full_text: Zampa to McCarthy, no run, tosses the wrong 'un outside off, McCarthy lunges and pushes it to cover

short_text: Zampa to Fionn Hand, Bowled!! Cleaned up! Second wicket for Zampa and Australia are two wickets away. Hand moves too far
full_text: Zampa to Fionn Hand, Bowled!! Cleaned up! Second wicket for Zampa and Australia are two wickets away. Hand moves too far across his stumps, sits down and attempts the sweep, but Zampa slips in the googly and lands it full, beats Hand behind his legs and the ball crashes into middle-stump.

short_text: Zampa to Tucker, 1 run, flighted on leg-stump, Tucker backs away and drives to long-on
full_text: Zampa to Tucker, 1 run, flighted on leg-stump, Tucker backs away and drives to long-on

short_text: Cummins to Fionn Hand, , overcooks the full delivery and Hand puts it away, he bends down and reaches it then slices it
full_text: Cummins to Fionn Hand, , overcooks the full delivery and Hand puts it away, he bends down and reaches it then slices it over the cover-point region, Agar was at deep point but he had no chance of stopping that

short_text: Cummins to Fionn Hand, no run, I0$ bouncer outside off, Hand sways out of the line and lets it pass
full_text: Cummins to Fionn Hand, no run, I0$ bouncer outside off, Hand sways out of the line and lets it pass

full_text: Cummins to Tucker, 1 run, I0$ low full toss on leg-stump, Tucker makes room and drills it to long-on

full_text: Cummins to Fionn Hand, 1 run, short and into the body, Hand hops and fends it to square leg

full_text: Cummins to Tucker, 1 run, off-pace delivery and Tucker pulls it on the bounce to deep mid-wicket, Maxwell keeps it to a single

short_text: Cummins to Tucker, no run, starts with a slower ball into the wicket, Tucker slashes and misses. The ball bounces in fro
full_text: Cummins to Tucker, no run, starts with a slower ball into the wicket, Tucker slashes and misses. The ball bounces in front of Wade

short_text: Zampa to Tucker, 1 run, drifting into the pads, Tucker works it through mid-wicket and this time settles with a single
full_text: Zampa to Tucker, 1 run, drifting into the pads, Tucker works it through mid-wicket and this time settles with a single

short_text: Zampa to Tucker, 2 runs, wrong 'un and Tucker nudges it with the spin into the mid-wicket pocket, races back for the sec
full_text: Zampa to Tucker, 2 runs, wrong 'un and Tucker nudges it with the spin into the mid-wicket pocket, races back for the second and beats Agar's throw

short_text: Zampa to Fionn Hand, 1 run, comes down the track and takes it on the full, driven down to long-off
full_text: Zampa to Fionn Hand, 1 run, comes down the track and takes it on the full, driven down to long-off

short_text: Zampa to Fionn Hand, no run, quicker googly around off, Hand brings his bat down and stabs it to backward point
full_text: Zampa to Fionn Hand, no run, quicker googly around off, Hand brings his bat down and stabs it to backward point

short_text: Zampa to Mark Adair, Stumped!! It was only a matter of time before Zampa had a wicket. Adair gives the charge and does n
full_text: Zampa to Mark Adair, Stumped!! It was only a matter of time before Zampa had a wicket. Adair gives the charge and does not get to the pitch, he still goes through with his swing and is beaten on the outside edge, Wade does the rest behind the stumps. Zampa saw him coming there and hence dragged the length back smartly.

short_text: Zampa to Tucker, 1 run, flatter and around off, Tucker makes room and knocks it past cover
full_text: Zampa to Tucker, 1 run, flatter and around off, Tucker makes room and knocks it past cover

short_text: Starc to Tucker, 1 run, Cummins puts one down and Starc shakes his head as he walks away. He deceived Tucker with a slow
full_text: Starc to Tucker, 1 run, Cummins puts one down and Starc shakes his head as he walks away. He deceived Tucker with a slower ball and the heave turns out to be a big top-edge, skies towards mid-wicket and Cummins runs in from the deep, goes reverse cup and mostly doesn't even lay a finger on that. He overran the ball and hence got into an awkward position

short_text: Starc to Tucker, 2 runs, full and outside off, Tucker slices it over backward point, Zampa and Agar keep it down to a br
full_text: Starc to Tucker, 2 runs, full and outside off, Tucker slices it over backward point, Zampa and Agar keep it down to a brace

short_text: Starc to Tucker, no run, off-pace delivery and Tucker backs away, he's early into the cut and is beaten
full_text: Starc to Tucker, no run, off-pace delivery and Tucker backs away, he's early into the cut and is beaten

short_text: Starc to Tucker, , back to back boundaries. Tucker keeping Ireland's hope alive. He makes room and drills the drive betw
full_text: Starc to Tucker, , back to back boundaries. Tucker keeping Ireland's hope alive. He makes room and drills the drive between extra cover and mid-off, bisected the two fielders perfectly

short_text: Starc to Tucker, , slower ball dug into the surface and Tucker had ample time to pick that, he hangs back and nails the
full_text: Starc to Tucker, , slower ball dug into the surface and Tucker had ample time to pick that, he hangs back and nails the pull past mid-wicket. No one in the deep to stop that

short_text: Starc to Mark Adair, 1 run, back of a length on off, Adair tucks it in front of square past mid-wicket
full_text: Starc to Mark Adair, 1 run, back of a length on off, Adair tucks it in front of square past mid-wicket

short_text: Zampa to Tucker, no run, fired full on middle, Tucker closes the bat face and the leading edge rolls back to Zampa
full_text: Zampa to Tucker, no run, fired full on middle, Tucker closes the bat face and the leading edge rolls back to Zampa

full_text: Zampa to Mark Adair, 1 run, wrong 'un which is tad short, Adair cuts square and Marsh tidies up from backward point

full_text: Zampa to Mark Adair, no run, quicker, fuller and around off, Adair pushes it back to Zampa

full_text: Zampa to Mark Adair, , fraction short and Adair had the width to free his arms, cracks the cut behind point and the ball splits the two fielders

short_text: Zampa to Mark Adair, no run, googly that turns in, Adair hangs back and works it to mid-wicket
full_text: Zampa to Mark Adair, no run, googly that turns in, Adair hangs back and works it to mid-wicket

short_text: Zampa to Mark Adair, no run, Adair knocks it towards cover and Tucker wanted a single, sent back and Tucker was in troub
full_text: Zampa to Mark Adair, no run, Adair knocks it towards cover and Tucker wanted a single, sent back and Tucker was in trouble had Zampa collected Warner's throw and removed the bails

short_text: Stoinis to Mark Adair, 1 run, mistimes his flat-batted slap to long-on for a single, was fraction short, but Mark Adair
full_text: Stoinis to Mark Adair, 1 run, mistimes his flat-batted slap to long-on for a single, was fraction short, but Mark Adair couldn't middle it

short_text: Stoinis to Mark Adair, no run, short ball on middle and leg, Mark Adair makes room and attempts an upper cut, but gets b
full_text: Stoinis to Mark Adair, no run, short ball on middle and leg, Mark Adair makes room and attempts an upper cut, but gets beaten

short_text: Stoinis to Mark Adair, 2 runs, heaves this length ball through backward square leg for a couple of runs does Mark Adair
full_text: Stoinis to Mark Adair, 2 runs, heaves this length ball through backward square leg for a couple of runs does Mark Adair

short_text: Stoinis to Mark Adair, 2 runs, short of a length around middle and leg, Mark Adair looks to hook it away, gets a top edg
full_text: Stoinis to Mark Adair, 2 runs, short of a length around middle and leg, Mark Adair looks to hook it away, gets a top edge that flies over the keeper as they take a couple of runs

short_text: Stoinis to Delany, Caught by Maxwell!! Looks to go big against Stoinis, swings across, but miscues it completely to mid-
full_text: Stoinis to Delany, Caught by Maxwell!! Looks to go big against Stoinis, swings across, but miscues it completely to mid-on. Maxwell stationed there is quick to move across to his left, he calls for it and completes a relatively easy catch eventually. The 43-run partnership has been broken as Ireland sink further.

short_text: Stoinis to Tucker, 1 run, pitched up by Stoinis outside off, driven through cover by Tucker for a single
full_text: Stoinis to Tucker, 1 run, pitched up by Stoinis outside off, driven through cover by Tucker for a single

short_text: Zampa to Tucker, 1 run, nudged to long-on by Tucker and Delany wanted two. He was almost halfway down the track for the
full_text: Zampa to Tucker, 1 run, nudged to long-on by Tucker and Delany wanted two. He was almost halfway down the track for the second, but the throw came at Zampa's end. Zampa tried for a relayed throw, but Wade couldn't gather it cleanly

short_text: Zampa to Delany, 1 run, tries to go big against this leg-break, mistimes it to wide long-on for a single
full_text: Zampa to Delany, 1 run, tries to go big against this leg-break, mistimes it to wide long-on for a single

full_text: Zampa to Tucker, 1 run, shimmies down the wicket and drives this to long-on for one

full_text: Zampa to Tucker, no run, goes for a sweep, but gets hit on the pads, impact well outside off though

full_text: Zampa to Delany, 1 run, slices this through cover for a single as the ball goes touch short

full_text: Zampa to Tucker, 1 run, low full toss on off, Tucker drives this to long-off for one

full_text: Hazlewood to Delany, no run, short ball outside off, Delany rides the bounce, taps this in front of point

full_text: Hazlewood to Tucker, 1 run, drilled down to long-on by Tucker for a single

full_text: Hazlewood to Tucker, , shimmies down the wicket to glance this away, gets beaten down leg, wide given

full_text: Hazlewood to Tucker, no run, walks back and across in the crease, attempts a square cut against this short ball, connects thin air

short_text: Hazlewood to Delany, 1 run, a well directed bouncer by Hazlewood, Delany goes for a pull, gets a top edge that drops in
full_text: Hazlewood to Delany, 1 run, a well directed bouncer by Hazlewood, Delany goes for a pull, gets a top edge that drops in no man's land beyond backward square leg

full_text: Hazlewood to Tucker, 1 run, glanced down to fine leg as the bowler goes short on the batter's pads

full_text: Hazlewood to Delany, 1 run, shimmies down the wicket and flat-bats this to long-on for one

full_text: Maxwell to Delany, 1 run, flatter around middle and off, Delany knocks this to cover for a single

full_text: Maxwell to Delany, , makes room and carves this length ball through point for a rollicking boundary does Delany

full_text: Maxwell to Tucker, 1 run, with a closed bat face, Tucker nudges this through mid-wicket for one

full_text: Maxwell to Tucker, no run, goes for a sweep, gets hit on the pads though

full_text: Maxwell to Delany, 1 run, nudged into the leg-side by Delany

full_text: Maxwell to Tucker, 1 run, reverse swept to square third man for a single

short_text: Starc to Delany, , end of the powerplay. Contrasting overs by Starc. Took two wickets in his first over, but concedes th
full_text: Starc to Delany, , end of the powerplay. Contrasting overs by Starc. Took two wickets in his first over, but concedes three boundaries in his next over. This was pitched up by him outside off and Delany plays it late, steering it through square third man with impeccable timing

short_text: Starc to Tucker, byes, 1 run, walks down the wicket to play this ball, but Starc goes short and beats the batter. Wade c
full_text: Starc to Tucker, byes, 1 run, walks down the wicket to play this ball, but Starc goes short and beats the batter. Wade can't collect the ball cleanly though, and they take a bye

short_text: Starc to Tucker, no run, full and quick outside off, Tucker tries to drive this through the off-side, connects thin air.
full_text: Starc to Tucker, no run, full and quick outside off, Tucker tries to drive this through the off-side, connects thin air.

short_text: Starc to Tucker, , a waist high full toss by Starc and the ball sails over the stumps to the keeper. Tucker was trying t
full_text: Starc to Tucker, , a waist high full toss by Starc and the ball sails over the stumps to the keeper. Tucker was trying to play the scoop, but couldn't connect

short_text: Starc to Tucker, no run, pitched up by Starc around off, Tucker is down the wicket to steer this to point
full_text: Starc to Tucker, no run, pitched up by Starc around off, Tucker is down the wicket to steer this to point

short_text: Starc to Tucker, , short and punished! Latches on to this short one and pulls it through square leg quite powerfully, ba
full_text: Starc to Tucker, , short and punished! Latches on to this short one and pulls it through square leg quite powerfully, back-to-back boundaries for Tucker

short_text: Starc to Tucker, , on a length around middle and leg, Tucker dances down the wicket and times his flick through mid-wick
full_text: Starc to Tucker, , on a length around middle and leg, Tucker dances down the wicket and times his flick through mid-wicket for a rollicking boundary

short_text: Cummins to Tucker, 3 runs, dances down the wicket and heaves this length ball through wide mid-on for three runs to end
full_text: Cummins to Tucker, 3 runs, dances down the wicket and heaves this length ball through wide mid-on for three runs to end the 5th over

short_text: Cummins to Tucker, no run, short of a length around middle and leg, Tucker looks to hack this through the leg-side, gets
full_text: Cummins to Tucker, no run, short of a length around middle and leg, Tucker looks to hack this through the leg-side, gets hit on the thigh pad

short_text: Cummins to Tucker, , goes for a pull against this short ball, but it's down the leg-side. Australia appeal for a caught
full_text: Cummins to Tucker, , goes for a pull against this short ball, but it's down the leg-side. Australia appeal for a caught behind, but the signal from the umpire is a wide ball instead

short_text: Cummins to Tucker, 2 runs, good length delivery around middle and leg, Tucker clips this through square leg for a couple
full_text: Cummins to Tucker, 2 runs, good length delivery around middle and leg, Tucker clips this through square leg for a couple of runs

short_text: Cummins to Tucker, no run, tries to be cheeky, attempts a scoop as the ball sails over the middle stump
full_text: Cummins to Tucker, no run, tries to be cheeky, attempts a scoop as the ball sails over the middle stump

short_text: Cummins to Tucker, , just a gentle shimmy as Tucker chips this length ball over the fielder at mid-on. All about timing
full_text: Cummins to Tucker, , just a gentle shimmy as Tucker chips this length ball over the fielder at mid-on. All about timing as the Ireland fans get something to cheer about

short_text: Cummins to Tucker, no run, on a length around middle and leg, Tucker nudges this to mid-on
full_text: Cummins to Tucker, no run, on a length around middle and leg, Tucker nudges this to mid-on

short_text: Starc to Dockrell, Bowled!! Ireland have been destroyed within the powerplay. Starc nails another terrific yorker, beats
full_text: Starc to Dockrell, Bowled!! Ireland have been destroyed within the powerplay. Starc nails another terrific yorker, beats Dockrell for pace and the stumps have been shattered again. Unplayable stuff this, and Australia are on top. World champions for a reason!

short_text: Starc to Dockrell, no run, yorker length ball outside off, too quick for the batter who leaves it alone
full_text: Starc to Dockrell, no run, yorker length ball outside off, too quick for the batter who leaves it alone

short_text: Starc to Dockrell, no run, a full toss around off, Dockrell pushes this to cover from within the crease
full_text: Starc to Dockrell, no run, a full toss around off, Dockrell pushes this to cover from within the crease

short_text: Starc to Dockrell, no run, full length delivery outside off, Dockrell attempts a drive, connects thin air
full_text: Starc to Dockrell, no run, full length delivery outside off, Dockrell attempts a drive, connects thin air

short_text: Starc to Campher, Bowled!! Typical Starc dismissal. A booming inswinger on a fuller length, and the batter completely ge
full_text: Starc to Campher, Bowled!! Typical Starc dismissal. A booming inswinger on a fuller length, and the batter completely gets beaten as he tries to play this with a straight bat. The ball sneaks through his bat - pad, the stumps have been rattled and Ireland are four down. Fantastic start by Starc!

short_text: Starc to Tucker, leg byes, 1 run, sharp inswinger around leg, Tucker misses out on his flick as he gets rapped on the pa
full_text: Starc to Tucker, leg byes, 1 run, sharp inswinger around leg, Tucker misses out on his flick as he gets rapped on the pads. Comfortably sliding down leg, hence the umpire wasn't interested

short_text: Maxwell to Tector, Caught by (sub)Smith!! Short ball by Maxwell and Tector has pulled this straight to Steve Smith at sq
full_text: Maxwell to Tector, Caught by (sub)Smith!! Short ball by Maxwell and Tector has pulled this straight to Steve Smith at square leg. He is not going to miss those as Ireland are three down within the first three overs. Maxwell strikes twice in his first over and the task for Ireland has almost gotten impossible with three of their mainstays gone so early.

short_text: Maxwell to Tector, , touch fuller around off and Tector has drilled this right down the ground for a boundary. Nicely ti
full_text: Maxwell to Tector, , touch fuller around off and Tector has drilled this right down the ground for a boundary. Nicely timed and placed

short_text: Maxwell to Tector, 2 runs, nudged down to fine leg for a couple of runs as Tector is off the mark
full_text: Maxwell to Tector, 2 runs, nudged down to fine leg for a couple of runs as Tector is off the mark

short_text: Maxwell to Tector, no run, short ball on middle and leg, Tector looks to work it away, gets hit on the pads
full_text: Maxwell to Tector, no run, short ball on middle and leg, Tector looks to work it away, gets hit on the pads

short_text: Maxwell to Stirling, Caught by Cummins!! Right then, the two Ireland openers - both of them are back to the pavilion. In
full_text: Maxwell to Stirling, Caught by Cummins!! Right then, the two Ireland openers - both of them are back to the pavilion. In their quest to be ultra-positive, Ireland find themselves in huge trouble. Was a slightly short ball around off and Stirling slapped it straight to the fielder at mid-off. Cummins is swift to move across to his left as he completes a sharp low catch.

short_text: Maxwell to Stirling, no run, floated around off, Stirling pushes it to cover
full_text: Maxwell to Stirling, no run, floated around off, Stirling pushes it to cover

short_text: Cummins to Balbirnie, Bowled!! Shuffles across in the crease to flick this away, but moves a bit too much. Was trying to
full_text: Cummins to Balbirnie, Bowled!! Shuffles across in the crease to flick this away, but moves a bit too much. Was trying to flick this away, but the ball swings in sharply and knocks timber. The off-stump goes for a walk and Ireland have lost their captain quite early in the run chase.

short_text: Cummins to Balbirnie, no run, stays put in the crease and punches this length ball to cover from within the crease
full_text: Cummins to Balbirnie, no run, stays put in the crease and punches this length ball to cover from within the crease

short_text: Cummins to Stirling, leg byes, 1 run, swings in sharply and strikes the batter on the thigh pad to roll towards the slip
full_text: Cummins to Stirling, leg byes, 1 run, swings in sharply and strikes the batter on the thigh pad to roll towards the slip cordon

short_text: Cummins to Stirling, , Picks the bones out of this length ball, treks back and swipes it over deep square leg for a clea
full_text: Cummins to Stirling, , Picks the bones out of this length ball, treks back and swipes it over deep square leg for a clean six. Stirling in the house folks!

short_text: Cummins to Stirling, , flicked away! On a length around middle and leg, Stirling flicks this over square leg for a bound
full_text: Cummins to Stirling, , flicked away! On a length around middle and leg, Stirling flicks this over square leg for a boundary, that's his first one of the night

short_text: Cummins to Stirling, no run, short of a length around middle and off, Stirling looks to work it through the leg-side, ge
full_text: Cummins to Stirling, no run, short of a length around middle and off, Stirling looks to work it through the leg-side, gets hit on the thigh pad

full_text: Hazlewood to Balbirnie, no run, back of a length around off, Balbirnie opens the bat face, steers this to point

short_text: Hazlewood to Balbirnie, , Rocks back in the crease and pumps this short ball over deep backward square leg to open his a
full_text: Hazlewood to Balbirnie, , Rocks back in the crease and pumps this short ball over deep backward square leg to open his account with a maximum

short_text: Hazlewood to Balbirnie, no run, appeal for a caught behind, turned down! Oh, there was a sound, and tell you what, that
full_text: Hazlewood to Balbirnie, no run, appeal for a caught behind, turned down! Oh, there was a sound, and tell you what, that was the ball clipping the stumps. Was a length delivery that shaped away to beat Balbirnie and clip the bails before it flew to the keeper

short_text: Hazlewood to Balbirnie, no run, seaming away from the batter around off, Balbirnie knocks it to cover with lack of footw
full_text: Hazlewood to Balbirnie, no run, seaming away from the batter around off, Balbirnie knocks it to cover with lack of footwork

short_text: Hazlewood to Balbirnie, no run, back of a length around off, Balbirnie defends it in front of cover
full_text: Hazlewood to Balbirnie, no run, back of a length around off, Balbirnie defends it in front of cover

short_text: Hazlewood to Stirling, 1 run, on a length around leg, Stirling swings hard at it, ends up getting an inside edge that ro
full_text: Hazlewood to Stirling, 1 run, on a length around leg, Stirling swings hard at it, ends up getting an inside edge that rolls in front of the keeper, and they take a single
